output.answer: Based on the Wikidata knowledge graph, there is no medical condition recorded for Billie Eilish (Q29564107) using the relevant properties (P1075: diagnosed with, P2865: has medical condition). The search returned no results, indicating this information is either not available in Wikidata or not explicitly documented.
output.formatted:
Based on the Wikidata knowledge graph, there is no medical condition recorded for Billie Eilish (Q29564107) using the relevant properties (P1075: diagnosed with, P2865: has medical condition). The search returned no results, indicating this information is either not available in Wikidata or not explicitly documented.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?subject WHERE {
  wd:Q29564107 wdt:P1075 ?condition ; wdt:P2865 ?condition
}
```
